title: NATIONAL REHABILITATION INFORMATION CENTER - 211info
text: NATIONAL REHABILITATION INFORMATION CENTER NATIONAL REHABILITATION INFORMATION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a library and database with books, research, journals, and videos about disabilities, education, rehabilitation, employment, independent living, assistive technology, and related laws and policies. Staff can help with reference questions, search for specific disability-related topics, provide access to bibliographic databases, and supply photocopies of materials that may be hard to find elsewhere. The website also includes searchable databases with disability and rehabilitation resources. 8400 Corporate Drive Suite 500 Landover, MD 20785 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 5:30am-2:30pm, closed federal holidays Email (800) 346-2742 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Helpline (800) 346-2742 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, email, or visit website for more information FEES: Document delivery is $0.05 per page with a minimum charge of $5. International shipping charges apply. DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, American Sign Language (ASL) AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Special Libraries * Disabilities Issues Specialized Information and Referral * Disabilities Issues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NATIONAL REHABILITATION INFORMATION CENTER
